args.query: SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating_all_reviews FROM review;

exec_args.sql: SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating_all_reviews FROM review;

result.preview: {"error": "No businesses matched 'Indianapolis, Indiana' in business.description; cannot compute city-specific average with given data.", "avg_rating_all_reviews": 3.515}

"Unable to compute the average rating for businesses located in Indianapolis, Indiana because no businesses in the business collection matched the location filter (business.description containing \u201cIndianapolis, Indiana\u201d).\n\nFor reference, the overall average rating across all reviews in the dataset is 3.515."

args.answer:
Unable to compute the average rating for businesses located in Indianapolis, Indiana because no businesses in the business collection matched the location filter (business.description containing “Indianapolis, Indiana”).

For reference, the overall average rating across all reviews in the dataset is 3.515.
